main.name: Titania, Nature's Force
main.oracle_text:
You may play Forests from your graveyard.
Whenever a Forest you control enters, create a 5/3 green Elemental creature token.
Whenever an Elemental you control dies, you may mill three cards.

card.name: Eternal Witness
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may return target card from your graveyard to your hand.
card.flavor_text: She remembers every word spoken, from the hero's oath to the baby's cry.

card.name: Heroic Intervention
card.oracle_text: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Lotus Field
card.oracle_text:
Hexproof
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, sacrifice two lands.
{T}: Add three mana of any one color.

card.name: Elemental Bond
card.oracle_text: Whenever a creature you control with power 3 or greater enters, draw a card.
card.flavor_text:
"I want to help Zendikar. Show me the way."
—Nissa Revane

card.name: Concordant Crossroads
card.oracle_text: All creatures have haste.

card.name: Azusa, Lost but Seeking
card.oracle_text: You may play two additional lands on each of your turns.
card.flavor_text: "I do not miss Jukai Forest. It is not my home. My home is Kamigawa, its people my family. Wherever I set my pack and rest my head, I am home."

card.name: Misty Rainforest
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Forest or Island card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Verdant Catacombs
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Swamp or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Nissa, Who Shakes the World
card.oracle_text:
Whenever you tap a Forest for mana, add an additional {G}.
+1: Put three +1/+1 counters on up to one target noncreature land you control. Untap it. It becomes a 0/0 Elemental creature with vigilance and haste that's still a land.
−8: You get an emblem with "Lands you control have indestructible." Search your library for any number of Forest cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Prismatic Vista
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: There is beauty in the uncertainty of potential.

card.name: Strip Mine
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}, Sacrifice this land: Destroy target land.
card.flavor_text: Unlike previous conflicts, the war between Urza and Mishra made Dominaria itself a casualty of war.

card.name: Exploration
card.oracle_text: You may play an additional land on each of your turns.
card.flavor_text: With every step she took, a new world unfolded before her.

card.name: Constant Mists
card.oracle_text:
Buyback—Sacrifice a land. (You may sacrifice a land in addition to any other costs as you cast this spell. If you do, put this card into your hand as it resolves.)
Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn.

card.name: Three Visits
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"Trying to meet a worthy man in the wrong way is as bad as closing the door on an invited guest."
—Mencius, a Chinese philosopher

card.name: Scapeshift
card.oracle_text: Sacrifice any number of lands. Search your library for up to that many land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"Changes far greater than the turning of the leaves await us at season's end."
—Colfenor, the Last Yew

card.name: Avenger of Zendikar
card.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, create a 0/1 green Plant creature token for each land you control.
Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you may put a +1/+1 counter on each Plant creature you control.

card.name: Wooded Foothills
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Mountain or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Where dragons' breath once burned, their bones now freeze.

card.name: Windswept Heath
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Forest or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Where dragons once roared, their bones now keen.

card.name: Nykthos, Shrine to Nyx
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}: Choose a color. Add an amount of mana of that color equal to your devotion to that color. (Your devotion to a color is the number of mana symbols of that color in the mana costs of permanents you control.)

card.name: Oracle of Mul Daya
card.oracle_text:
You may play an additional land on each of your turns.
Play with the top card of your library revealed.
You may play lands from the top of your library.

card.name: Ashaya, Soul of the Wild
card.oracle_text:
Ashaya's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands you control.
Nontoken creatures you control are Forest lands in addition to their other types. (They're still affected by summoning sickness.)

card.name: Nature's Lore
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a Forest card, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: "Greetings, tired traveler."

card.name: Zuran Orb
card.oracle_text: Sacrifice a land: You gain 2 life.
card.flavor_text:
"Obsession is Zur's one flaw as a magic user. His total preoccupation with immortality has become an affliction for his otherwise brilliant mind."
—Jodah, Archmage Eternal

card.name: Splendid Reclamation
card.oracle_text: Return all land cards from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.
card.flavor_text:
"These seeds waited faithfully for the sun to rise again. Now, their patience is rewarded."
—Wrenn

card.name: Boseiju, Who Endures
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {G}.
Channel — {1}{G}, Discard this card: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or nonbasic land an opponent controls. That player may search their library for a land card with a basic land type, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each legendary creature you control.

card.name: Burgeoning
card.oracle_text: Whenever an opponent plays a land, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.
card.flavor_text: Given time, a single seed can sprout a mighty forest.

card.name: Green Sun's Zenith
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a green creature card with mana value X or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Shuffle Green Sun's Zenith into its owner's library.
card.flavor_text: As the green sun crowned, Phyrexian prophecies glowed on the Tree of Tales.

card.name: Argoth, Sanctum of Nature
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control a legendary green creature.
{T}: Add {G}.
{2}{G}{G}, {T}: Create a 2/2 green Bear creature token, then mill three cards. Activate only as a sorcery.
(Melds with Titania, Voice of Gaea.)

card.name: Titania, Voice of Gaea
card.oracle_text:
Reach
Whenever one or more land cards are put into your graveyard from anywhere, you gain 2 life.
At the beginning of your upkeep, if there are four or more land cards in your graveyard and you both own and control Titania, Voice of Gaea and a land named Argoth, Sanctum of Nature, exile them, then meld them into Titania, Gaea Incarnate.

card.name: Awaken the Woods
card.oracle_text: Create X 1/1 green Forest Dryad land creature tokens. (They're affected by summoning sickness.)

card.name: Staff of Titania
Worldly Tutor
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a creature card, reveal it, then shuffle and put the card on top.
card.flavor_text: Wisdom is a seed. Nurtured with patience and care, it will bear new fruit each season.

card.name: Sylvan Library
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of your draw step, you may draw two additional cards. If you do, choose two cards in your hand drawn this turn. For each of those cards, pay 4 life or put the card on top of your library.

card.name: Crop Rotation
card.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a land.
Search your library for a land card, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: "Hmm ... maybe lotuses this year."

card.name: Conduit of Worlds
card.oracle_text:
You may play lands from your graveyard.
{T}: Choose target nonland permanent card in your graveyard. If you haven't cast a spell this turn, you may cast that card. If you do, you can't cast additional spells this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.set_name: Phyrexia: All Will Be One Commander
card.name: Beast Within
card.oracle_text: Destroy target permanent. Its controller creates a 3/3 green Beast creature token.
card.flavor_text:
"Kill the weak so they can't drag the strong down to their level. This is true compassion."
—Benzir, archdruid of Temple Might

card.name: The Great Henge
card.oracle_text:
This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the greatest power among creatures you control.
{T}: Add {G}{G}. You gain 2 life.
Whenever a nontoken creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on it and draw a card.

card.name: Tribute to the World Tree
card.oracle_text: Whenever a creature you control enters, draw a card if its power is 3 or greater. Otherwise, put two +1/+1 counters on it.
card.flavor_text:
"The Tree was the heart of our world. It made me what I am and pulled me back from the brink of death. I won't allow it to be forgotten."
—Esika, god of the Tree

card.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
card.name: Entish Restoration
card.oracle_text: Sacrifice a land. Search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. If you control a creature with power 4 or greater, instead search your library for up to three basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: "Welcome to the Treegarth of Orthanc!"

card.name: Finale of Devastation
card.oracle_text: Search your library and/or graveyard for a creature card with mana value X or less and put it onto the battlefield. If you search your library this way, shuffle. If X is 10 or more, creatures you control get +X/+X and gain haste until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: With a roar, the forest came alive.

card.name: Cultivate
card.oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: All seeds share a common bond, calling to each other across infinity.

card.name: Garruk's Uprising
card.oracle_text:
When this enchantment enters, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, draw a card.
Creatures you control have trample. (Each of those creatures can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)
Whenever a creature you control with power 4 or greater enters, draw a card.

card.name: Parallel Lives
card.oracle_text: If an effect would create one or more tokens under your control, it creates twice that many of those tokens instead.

card.name: Crucible of Worlds
card.oracle_text: You may play lands from your graveyard.

card.name: Force of Vigor
card.oracle_text:
If it's not your turn, you may exile a green card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
Destroy up to two target artifacts and/or enchantments.
card.flavor_text: General Store Faces Thorny Problems, Spiking Prices

card.name: Harrow
card.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a land.
Search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: The Roil redraws the world as it passes, leaving only the hedrons unchanged.

card.name: Ancient Greenwarden
card.oracle_text:
Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.)
You may play lands from your graveyard.
If a land entering causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.
card.flavor_text: When the ruins awakened, so did their defenses.

card.name: Sylvan Safekeeper
card.oracle_text: Sacrifice a land: Target creature you control gains shroud until end of turn. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities.)
card.flavor_text:
"He has been to the heart of the wood. Did you truly expect to wield power over him?"
—Oakhide druid

card.name: Emerald Medallion
card.oracle_text: Green spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Six
card.oracle_text:
Reach
Whenever Six attacks, mill three cards. You may put a land card from among them into your hand.
During your turn, nonland permanent cards in your graveyard have retrace. (You may cast permanent cards from your graveyard by discarding a land card in addition to paying their other costs.)

card.name: Dryad of the Ilysian Grove
card.oracle_text:
You may play an additional land on each of your turns.
Lands you control are every basic land type in addition to their other types.
card.flavor_text:
"Vine-wreathed, he nurtures life among the dead."
—Psemilla, Meletian poet

card.name: Yavimaya, Cradle of Growth
card.oracle_text: Each land is a Forest in addition to its other land types.
card.flavor_text:
"Multani's heart is a seed, and all of Yavimaya is its flower. There is as much life here as in the rest of Dominaria together."
—Karn

card.name: Ramunap Excavator
card.oracle_text: You may play lands from your graveyard.
card.flavor_text: "This world was once so much more than the confines of Naktamun."

card.name: Fabled Passage
card.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Then if you control four or more lands, untap that land.
card.flavor_text: Beyond Valley lies danger—and promise.

card.name: Greater Good
card.oracle_text: Sacrifice a creature: Draw cards equal to the sacrificed creature's power, then discard three cards.
card.flavor_text:
"There's wisdom to be gained in death—whether it be one's own or someone else's."
—Jarad, Golgari Lich-Lord

card.name: Lotus Cobra
card.oracle_text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, add one mana of any color.
card.flavor_text: Its hood blossoms as a warning: receive your gift, but stray no closer.

card.name: Elvish Reclaimer
card.oracle_text:
This creature gets +2/+2 as long as there are three or more land cards in your graveyard.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice a land: Search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Rampant Growth
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Nature grows solutions to its problems.

card.name: Dryad Arbor
card.oracle_text: (This land isn't a spell, it's affected by summoning sickness, and it has "{T}: Add {G}.")
card.flavor_text:
"Touch no tree, break no branch, and speak only the question you wish answered."
—Von Yomm, elder druid, to her initiates

card.name: Rampaging Baloths
card.oracle_text:
Trample
Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a 4/4 green Beast creature token.
card.flavor_text:
"When the land is angry, so are they."
—Nissa Revane

card.name: Springbloom Druid
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a land. If you do, search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: "New growth applies a healing poultice to wounds long scabbed over."

card.name: Loot, Exuberant Explorer
card.oracle_text:
You may play an additional land on each of your turns.
{4}{G}{G}, {T}: Look at the top six cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card with mana value less than or equal to the number of lands you control from among them and put it onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.

card.name: Craterhoof Behemoth
card.oracle_text:
Haste
When this creature enters, creatures you control gain trample and get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of creatures you control.
card.flavor_text: Its footsteps of today are the lakes of tomorrow.

card.name: Cultivator Colossus
card.oracle_text:
Trample
Cultivator Colossus's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands you control.
When this creature enters, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. If you do, draw a card and repeat this process.

card.name: Traveling Chocobo
card.oracle_text:
You may look at the top card of your library any time.
You may play lands and cast Bird spells from the top of your library.
If a land or Bird you control entering the battlefield causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Tireless Provisioner
card.oracle_text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a Food token or a Treasure token. (Food is an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life." Treasure is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
card.flavor_text: She won't let you leave her home with an empty belly!

card.name: Titania, Protector of Argoth
card.oracle_text:
When Titania enters, return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield.
Whenever a land you control is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, create a 5/3 green Elemental creature token.

card.name: Roiling Regrowth
card.oracle_text: Sacrifice a land. Search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"Roots find their way through rock, and even mountains must give way to new growth."
—Nissa Revane

card.name: Evendo, Waking Haven
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {G}.
Station (Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this Planet. Station only as a sorcery.)
12+ | {G}, {T}: Add {G} for each creature you control.

card.name: Icetill Explorer
card.oracle_text:
You may play an additional land on each of your turns.
You may play lands from your graveyard.
Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, mill a card.
card.flavor_text: "Come! Join me in the sun!"

card.name: Greensleeves, Maro-Sorcerer
card.oracle_text:
Protection from planeswalkers and from Wizards
Greensleeves's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands you control.
Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a 3/3 green Badger creature token.

card.name: Scute Swarm
card.oracle_text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a 1/1 green Insect creature token. If you control six or more lands, create a token that's a copy of this creature instead.
card.flavor_text:
"Survival rule 782: There are *always* more scute bugs."
—Zurdi, goblin shortcutter

card.name: Sol Ring
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.
card.flavor_text:
"Model? I'm insulted. It's by all reasonable metrics a fully functional planetary system, scaled down for easier study."
—Urza, to Tawnos

card.name: Skyshroud Claim
card.oracle_text: Search your library for up to two Forest cards, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: "Flowstone spreads, but new life spreads faster."

card.name: Kodama's Reach
card.oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"The trees keep our history better than any digital device."
—Satsuki, the Living Lore

card.name: Titania, Nature's Force
card.oracle_text:
You may play Forests from your graveyard.
Whenever a Forest you control enters, create a 5/3 green Elemental creature token.
Whenever an Elemental you control dies, you may mill three cards.

tokens.flavor_text: "We have chuchitooos! Tamaaales! Granizaaadas! Churrooos! Empanaaadas!"

tokens.oracle_text: (This creature is affected by summoning sickness, and it has "{T}: Add {G}.")

tokens.name: Gilt-Leaf Alchemist
tokens.oracle_text:
Deathtouch
